use_cases: Right-click context menus for desktop and mobile applications
Nested sub-menu navigation with expandable items
Radio group selections within dropdown menus
Checkbox item selections for multi-select menu options
ai_summary: A context menu component built on Radix UI primitives providing accessible right-click menu functionality. Features nested sub-menus with chevron indicators, support for radio groups and checkbox items, and standard hover states. Uses flat, minimal styling with Tailwind CSS classes and lucide-react icons for visual elements.
